basic_details.job_title: TMC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Technician Biomedical, Scientific Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) Technician Biomedical & Scientific Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 08 June 2026 on the official website of TMC. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the TMC Technician Biomedical & Scientific Assistant Walk-in Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max 30 years for Technician Biomedical, Max 27 years for Scientific Assistant.
age_limit.details: Technician Biomedical: Maximum 30 years. Scientific Assistant (Biomedical): Maximum 27 years. Deserving and bright candidate may be given relaxation in age.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree/Diploma in Medical Electronics/Bio-medical for Technician, Diploma in Biomedical/Medical Electronics for Scientific Assistant.
qualification.details: Technician Biomedical: Full Time Degree/Diploma in Medical Electronics/Bio-medical from the State Board of Technical Examination (10+3), years' course. Experience: 0-2 year of Experience in Hospital in Maintenance/Services of Hospital Essential. Scientific Assistant (Biomedical): Diploma (Biomedical / Medical Electronics). 3 years' experience out of which 1 year in hospital setup. Desirable: A candidate desirous to work independently for in-house repairs/maintenance/calibration activity shall be preferred.

salary_details.details: Technician Biomedical: Rs.23,218/- Scientific Assistant (Biomedical): Rs.30,000/- (Higher remuneration may be offered to deserving & meritorious candidate(s)).

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Online Interview (for outstation candidates)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for receiving applications via email for online interviews is 08 June 2026. The walk-in interview is scheduled for 10 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts advertised by Tata Memorial Centre?
faq.answer: Tata Memorial Centre has advertised for the posts of Technician Biomedical and Scientific Assistant (Biomedical).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Technician Biomedical?
faq.answer: For the Technician Biomedical post, a Full Time Degree/Diploma in Medical Electronics/Bio-medical from the State Board of Technical Examination (10+3) is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Scientific Assistant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Scientific Assistant (Biomedical) post is 27 years. Relaxation may be given to deserving candidates.

faq.question: Q5. How can outstation candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Outstation candidates can attend the interview online by sending their resume along with supporting documents in a single PDF file to [email protected].

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Technician Biomedical post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Technician Biomedical post is Rs. 23,218/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for this TMC recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital and Research Centre, Shri Krishna Medical College and Hospital Campus, Umanagar, Muzaffarpur (Bihar) – 842004.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by Tata Memorial Centre for these posts.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need to carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates.
